"'''The Hidden'''" is an 7-page [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] featured in ''[[Star Wars Tales 6]]''. It was written by [[Sean Konot]] and [[Scott Morse]], illustrated by Scot Morse and lettered by Sean Konot.

==Plot summary==
[[File:Yoda_with_probe_arm.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and his new cooking tool.]]

Above the planet [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] launches multiple [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] pods. One of the droids is almost immediately attacked by a native creature but the droid easily kills it. At one moment the droid detects a little green creature and the droid followed it. Unfortunately for the droid, the little green creature is [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]. Yoda uses his lightsaber to disable the droid with ease.

The Imperials in their Star Destroyer are shocked by the sudden attack. The only problem is that they could not receive any transmissions from the planet, so they are unable to see who or what destroyed their scout. The onboard admiral quickly decides to skip this inhospitable planet on their scouting trip because he does not want to enrage [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Lord Vader]].

Afterward, Yoda has a new tool for cooking.
